TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 基國派部落
TEXT.citation: 基國派部落. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/基國派部落
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_基國派部落, title = 基國派部落, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/基國派部落} }

S.FORM: == 部落地理位置 == kya qutux betunux balay na qalang, cyux maki beh qalang ni Pyasan. 部落地名由來 cingay balay qu kyabil ru Tuba' sraral qasa.nanu yasa lalu Tayal qasa ga Tuba'.
== 部落地理位置 == kya qutux betunux balay na qalang, cyux maki beh qalang ni Pyasan. 部落地名由來 cingay balay qu kyabil ru Tuba' sraral qasa.nanu yasa lalu Tayal qasa ga Tuba'.
S.PHON: == ****** == kja qutux βetunux βalaj na qalaŋ, ʦ~ʨjux maki βeħ qalaŋ ni pjas~ɕan. ****** ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu kjaβil ru tuβaʔ s~ɕraral qas~ɕa.nanu jas~ɕa lalu tajal qas~ɕa ɣa tuβaʔ.
